definition.name: Dance Form Suitable
definition.description: Dance forms this product can suit, such as Bharatanatyam and Kuchipudi.

definition.name: Dance Range
definition.description: Shopper-facing dance range: regular dance, real kemp, or black kemp.

definition.name: Product Tier
definition.description: Quality or use tier: regular, premium, or professional stage.

definition.name: Dance Product Role
definition.description: Controlled role values such as short necklace, long haram, headset, mattal, ghungroo, or waist belt.

definition.name: Performance Context
definition.description: Event or use contexts such as arangetram, stage performance, practice, class, or ceremony.

definition.name: Buyer Context
definition.description: Buyer or dancer contexts such as kids, adult dancer, dance institute, teacher, or bridal classical styling.

definition.name: Sold Also As Set
definition.description: True when this standalone product is also available as part of a coordinated full set.

definition.name: Placement
definition.description: Dance placement such as neckline, upper chest, lower chest, forehead, ears, waist, braid, bun, ankle, or arm.

definition.name: Fit Notes
definition.description: Plain-language fit and placement guidance for dance buyers.

definition.name: Size Notes
definition.description: Additional size notes when exact measurement fields do not capture the buyer guidance.

definition.name: Measurement Confidence
definition.description: Measured, Owner confirmed, Inferred from product photos, Check product photos, or Not applicable.

definition.name: Necklace Drop Inches
definition.description: Approximate short necklace drop in inches where available.

definition.name: Haram Drop Inches
definition.description: Approximate long haram drop in inches where available.

definition.name: Waist Belt Adjustable Range
definition.description: Adjustable waist belt or vaddanam range as buyer-facing text.

definition.name: Jada Length Inches
definition.description: Approximate jada or braid accessory length in inches.

definition.name: Mattal Length Inches
definition.description: Approximate mattal or ear-chain length in inches.

definition.name: Bangle Size
definition.description: Bangle size or wrist fit text.

definition.name: Ghungroo Bell Count
definition.description: Number of bells for ghungroo or salangai products.

definition.name: Component Count
definition.description: Number of included dance jewellery components.

definition.name: Matching Product References
definition.description: Curated matching products for completing the dance look.

definition.name: Matching Collection References
definition.description: Curated matching collections for completing the dance look.

definition.name: Matching Finish
definition.description: Finish used for matching, such as gold, antique gold, real kemp, or black kemp.

definition.name: Stone Color
definition.description: Dominant stone color used for matching dance ornaments.

definition.name: Material
definition.description: Dance product material where known.

definition.name: Finish
definition.description: Visible finish such as gold polish, antique gold, real kemp, or black kemp.

definition.name: Care Instructions
definition.description: Care guidance for dance jewellery storage, sweat, water, perfume, and finish protection.

definition.name: Quality Checks
definition.description: Quality checks performed before packing dance jewellery.
